_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: NF1−/− cells transduced with GRDC24 at both time points were capable of developing myelination around these neurons as indicated by marker MPZ, in a similar way as NF1 WT FiPS
details: Cells transduced with GRDC24 were capable of developing myelination around neurons as indicated by MPZ marker, similar to NF1 WT FiPS
